| 627 | 2026-03-10 | 11.430 | DONE | `R-010` list encoding residual bucket を targeted-first でクローズ。Redis `tests/unit/type/list.tcl` `List quicklist -> listpack encoding conversion` を exact request-lifecycle regression `list_quicklist_to_listpack_encoding_conversion_matches_external_scenario` として追加し、その repro を基準に `LSET` replacement path を修正した。旧実装は quicklist 上の oversized element を small value に置き換えた後でも pre-replacement `listpack_growth_would_force_quicklist` を使って quicklist を再強制していたため、`create_quicklist lst \"$large a b\" -> RPOP 2 -> LSET -1 c` が Redis と違って `quicklist` のまま残っていた。修正後は `LSET` が previous encoding を見て、listpack からの replacement は従来どおり growth-based upgrade を許しつつ、既存 quicklist から compact payload へ置換した場合は shrink hysteresis (`maybe_preserve_quicklist_after_shrink`) だけを適用する。検証: targeted Rust PASS（`list_quicklist_to_listpack_encoding_conversion_matches_external_scenario`, `list_encoding_conversion_and_debug_reload_match_external_list_scenarios`, `list_object_encoding_ignores_quicklist_packed_threshold_external_scenarios`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`523 + 23 + 1`）；targeted external file probe `RUNTEXT_EXTRA_ARGS='--single unit/type/list' ./redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-list-r010-20260310-1/` で `[ok] List quicklist -> listpack encoding conversion` を確認した。なお同 probe では unrelated residual `Command being unblocked cause another command to get unblocked execution order test` が残っており、これは別 TODO として切り出す。Smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-10/11.430-list-quicklist-to-listpack-r010/` に保存した（before `4a383f5521`, after working tree, `RUNS=1 THREADS=1 CONNS=2 REQUESTS=2000 PIPELINE=1 SIZE_RANGE=32-256`; `SET ops -2.37%`, `GET ops -0.20%`, `SET p99 +18.39%`, `GET p99 +0.00%`。1 run なので非回帰ガードとしてのみ扱う）。 |
| 628 | 2026-03-10 | 11.431 | DONE | External-only list residual `Command being unblocked cause another command to get unblocked execution order test` を exact TCP regression `sync_replication_stream_preserves_nested_blmove_unblock_order_like_external_scenario` として移植した。Redis test と同じ順で `DEL` の後に replication stream を attach し、`BLMOVE src->dst` と `BLMOVE dst->src` の nested wake chain に対して replication stream が `SET key1`, `LPUSH src dummy`, `LMOVE src dst LEFT RIGHT`, `LMOVE dst src RIGHT LEFT`, `SET key2`, `SET key3` の順になることを直接 bytes で検証している。standalone repro は PASS したため、`unit/type/list` file-level failure は最小サーバーバグではなく前段 state 汚染または harness sequencing の可能性が高いと切り分けた。検証: targeted Rust `cargo test -p garnet-server sync_replication_stream_preserves_nested_blmove_unblock_order_like_external_scenario -- --nocapture` PASS。 |
| 629 | 2026-03-10 | 11.432 | DONE | `R-005` string residual bucket を targeted-first でクローズ。Redis `tests/unit/type/string.tcl` の残 failing cases を exact request-lifecycle regressions（`lcs_idx_and_matchlen_match_external_string_scenarios`, `memory_usage_string_bounds_match_external_scenario`）として先に固定し、その repro を基準に string semantics を修正した。`LCS` は Valkey と同じ 1-indexed DP table + backward backtracking に置き換え、tail-to-head segment emission で Redis の viral RNA fixture と同じ `IDX` / `WITHMATCHLEN` / `MINMATCHLEN` ranges を返すようにした。`MEMORY USAGE` は string path だけ generic object estimate から分離し、`12B`/`16B` header floor を使う `estimate_string_memory_usage_bytes` を導入して small strings の upper-bound violation（例: key=1,value=1 で `66 > 64`）を解消した。generic object estimate (`64B` overhead) はそのまま維持して object-family probesへの影響を避けている。検証: targeted Rust PASS（`cargo test -p garnet-server lcs_idx_and_matchlen_match_external_string_scenarios -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p garnet-server memory_usage_string_bounds_match_external_scenario -- --nocapture`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`526 + 23 + 1`）；targeted external `RUNTEXT_EXTRA_ARGS='--single unit/type/string' ./redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-string-r005-20260310-1/` with `ok=175 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=0`。Smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-10/11.432-string-lcs-memory-r005/` に保存した（before `6467db7f54`, after worktree, `RUNS=1 THREADS=1 CONNS=4 REQUESTS=2000 PIPELINE=1 SIZE_RANGE=1-64`; `SET ops +1.73%`, `GET ops -8.33%`, `SET p99 -6.72%`, `GET p99 +31.07%`。non-hot path かつ 1 run のため非回帰ガードとしてのみ扱う）。 |
| 630 | 2026-03-10 | 11.433 | DONE | `R-009` list-3 residual bucket を targeted-first でクローズ。Redis `tests/unit/type/list-3.tcl` `ziplist implementation: value encoding and backlink` の failing workload を exact request-lifecycle regression `list3_ziplist_value_encoding_and_backlink_external_scenario_runs_without_storage_failure` として先に固定し、その repro を基準に object-store sizing を修正した。新 regression は external scenario の body をそのまま mirror し、`list-max-listpack-size 16` の下で 200 個の mixed integer/large-string values を `RPUSH` し、`LLEN` と reverse `LINDEX` traversal を検証する。テスト側では external harness に合わせて `TsavoriteKvConfig { max_in_memory_pages: 16384 }` を使えるよう、`RequestProcessor::new_with_options_and_store_config(...)` へ初期化経路を分離した。根本原因は current monolithic object-value model で list payload 全体を 1 record に serialize する一方、default object-store page-size floor が `1 MiB` しかなく、list-3 workload が record-size 上限を超えていたことだった。修正として `DEFAULT_OBJECT_STORE_PAGE_SIZE_BITS` を `20 -> 22` に上げた。検証: targeted Rust PASS（`cargo test -p garnet-server list3_ziplist_value_encoding_and_backlink_external_scenario_runs_without_storage_failure -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p garnet-server list_quicklist_to_listpack_encoding_conversion_matches_external_scenario -- --nocapture`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`527 + 23 + 1`）；targeted external `RUNTEXT_EXTRA_ARGS='--single unit/type/list-3' ./redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-list3-r009-fix-20260310-1/` with `ok=11 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=0`。Smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-10/11.433-list3-object-page-r009/` に保存した（before `fb37d1a646`, after worktree, `RUNS=1 THREADS=1 CONNS=4 REQUESTS=2000 PIPELINE=1 SIZE_RANGE=1-64`; `SET ops -1.26%`, `GET ops +4.10%`, `SET p99 +0.00%`, `GET p99 -23.95%`。1 run なので非回帰ガードとしてのみ扱う）。 |

| 632 | 2026-03-10 | 11.435 | DONE | isolated `unit/querybuf` lane を targeted-first でクローズ。Redis `tests/unit/querybuf.tcl` の 4 ケースを exact TCP regression `query_buffer_resizing_matches_external_scenarios` として先に移植し、その repro を基準に `ServerMetrics` の query-buffer accounting を raw `receive_buffer.len()/capacity()` から Redis 互換の reusable/private model へ置換した。内容は、(1) per-client query-buffer logical allocation を追加し `CLIENT LIST qbuf/qbuf-free` を private-buffer state から描画、(2) partial command / large complete command / fat-argv incomplete frame で private qbuf を維持するよう connection path から observed query-buffer bytes を渡す、(3) RESP multibulk header の declared bulk length を軽量 parse して fat argv (`$1000000`) でも Redis 同様に >1MB qbuf を見せる、(4) idle shrink と recent-small-write shrink を logical housekeeping として適用する、の 4 点。検証: targeted Rust `cargo test -p garnet-server query_buffer_resizing_matches_external_scenarios -- --nocapture` PASS；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`528 + 23 + 1`）；targeted external `RUNTEXT_EXTRA_ARGS='--single unit/querybuf' ./redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-querybuf-20260310-1/` with `ok=4 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=0`。connection hot-path change なので smoke benchmark も追加し、`docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-10/11.435-querybuf-compat-rerender/` に `binary_ab_local.sh` 比較結果を保存した（before `bf2ac09e8f`, after worktree, `RUNS=1 THREADS=1 CONNS=4 REQUESTS=2000 PRELOAD_REQUESTS=2000 PIPELINE=1 SIZE_RANGE=1-64`; `SET ops +7.92%`, `GET ops +4.57%`, `SET p99 -38.32%`, `GET p99 -5.93%`。1 run のため非回帰 guard として扱う）。 |
| 633 | 2026-03-10 | 11.436 | DONE | isolated `unit/other` timeout lane を harness 側でクローズ。まず Redis `tests/unit/other.tcl` の timeout source を切り分け、既存 exact TCP regression `inline_pipelining_stresser_external_scenario_round_trips_all_pairs` は `make test-server` で安定 PASS する一方、external Tcl path では `PIPELINING stresser (also a regression for the old epoll bug)` が generic `--timeout 120` だと落ちることを確認した。単独 probe を `RUNTEXT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=180` で再実行すると `unit/other ok=25 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=6` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-other-timeout-probe-20260310-1/` で PASS したため server bug ではなく harness budget 不足と判断。対応として `redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` に `RUNTEXT_ISOLATED_OTHER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=180` を追加し、full mode の isolated `unit/other` だけ長い timeout を使うよう変更した。合わせて developer smoke 用に `RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=<unit/path>` を追加し、同じ restart/probe wrapper で isolated path だけを単独実行できるようにした。検証: `bash -n garnet-rs/tests/interop/redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` PASS；`RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/other ./redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` PASS with `redis_runtest_unit_other_external ok=25 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=6`；README も新 env と timeout policy に更新。 |
| 634 | 2026-03-10 | 11.437 | DONE | isolated `unit/scripting` の最大 bucket である `redis.setresp()` / RESP3 scripting bridge を targeted-first でクローズ。Redis `tests/unit/scripting.tcl` の `Script with RESP3 map` と `RESP2/2..RESP3/3 protocol parsing` / `resp3 attribute protocol parsing` を exact TCP regressions `scripting_resp3_map_external_scenario_runs_as_tcp_integration_test` と `scripting_resp_protocol_parsing_matrix_matches_external_scenarios` として先に移植し、その repro を基準に scripting runtime へ script-local RESP mode を追加した。実装内容は、(1) `redis.setresp(2|3)` を script/function runtime surface に追加、(2) `redis.call` / `redis.pcall` を thread-local RESP override 経由で script-local RESP2/3 実行に変更、(3) scripting bridge parser/serializer に RESP3 native type support を追加（map/set/double/bignum/verbatim/bool、attribute ignore、RESP3 null -> Lua nil, RESP2 null bulk/array -> Lua false）、(4) `DEBUG PROTOCOL` の不足 subcommand（`map` / `set` / `double` / `null`）を実装。追加で request-lifecycle regression `debug_protocol_subcommands_cover_resp2_and_resp3_shapes` も拡張した。検証: targeted Rust PASS（新規 2 tests + debug protocol regression）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`530 + 23 + 1`）；targeted external scripting probe PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-scripting-setresp-20260310-1/` with `ok=40 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=14`；isolated `unit/scripting` rerun improved from `ok=216 err=94 ignore=26` to `ok=292 err=18 ignore=26` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-scripting-isolated-20260310-1/`。残件は `unpack` / `acl_check_cmd()` / frozen-time expiration / `RESTORE` expired TTL / argv rewrite replication / `WAIT` gate の 6 bucket に圧縮。Smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-10/11.437-scripting-setresp-resp3-bridge/`（before `7f88be61c8`, after worktree, `RUNS=1 THREADS=1 CONNS=4 REQUESTS=2000 PRELOAD_REQUESTS=2000 PIPELINE=1 SIZE_RANGE=1-64`; `SET ops +0.13%`, `GET ops +2.76%`, `SET p99 +0.00%`, `GET p99 -6.72%`）。 |
| 635 | 2026-03-10 | 11.438 / 11.439 | DONE | isolated `unit/scripting` の残 bucket から `unpack` と `min-replicas` をまとめてクローズ。両者とも Lua/runtime rebuild と isolated `unit/scripting` rerun が必要なため、1 TODO = 1 commit の原則に対する mechanical-coupling 例外として同一 iteration に束ねた。まず vendored `lua-src` を workspace `[patch.crates-io]` で固定し、`LUAI_MAXCSTACK` を `8000 -> 32768` に上げて Redis `Script check unpack with massive arguments` シナリオを通した。exact regression `scripting_massive_unpack_arguments_match_external_scenario_for_eval_and_function` を追加し、`EVAL` と `FCALL` の両方で `redis.call('lpush', 'l', unpack(a))` with `7999` args を固定した。次に `min-replicas-to-write` gating を connection path に広げ、shebang script は `flags=no-writes` が無い限り good replicas を要求、non-shebang `EVAL` は actual mutating body のときだけ gate、`FCALL` は loaded function read-only metadata で gate するよう修正し、exact TCP regression `scripting_min_replicas_gate_matches_external_scenario` を追加した。検証: targeted Rust PASS（2 tests + existing unpack overflow guard）；targeted external single-case PASS for `Script check unpack with massive arguments` and `not enough good replicas`；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`532 + 23 + 1`）；isolated `unit/scripting` rerun improved from `ok=292 err=18 ignore=26` to `ok=295 err=15 ignore=26` at `/tmp/garnet-scripting-isolated-1773152536`。Smoke benchmark artifacts are stored in `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-10/11.438-439-scripting-unpack-min-replicas/`; `binary_ab_local.sh` was noisy across `RUNS=1`, `RUNS=3`, and `RUNS=3 REQUESTS=5000`, so the result is recorded as no stable regression signal rather than as a throughput claim. |
| 636 | 2026-03-10 | 11.440 | DONE | isolated `unit/scripting` の argv-rewrite replication residual bucket を targeted-first でクローズ。Redis `tests/unit/scripting.tcl` の `SPOP: We can call scripts rewriting client->argv from Lua`, `EXPIRE: We can call scripts rewriting client->argv from Lua`, `INCRBYFLOAT: We can call scripts expanding client->argv from Lua` を exact TCP regressions `sync_replication_stream_rewrites_script_spop_commands_like_external_scenario` と `sync_replication_stream_rewrites_script_expire_and_argv_expansion_like_external_scenarios` として先に移植し、その repro を基準に `RequestProcessor` へ per-request `ScriptReplicationEffect` queue を追加した。script 実行中の成功した non-error inner `redis.call`/`redis.pcall` ごとに command id / encoded argv / RESP reply を記録し、connection path は `EVAL*` / `FCALL*` のとき outer script command ではなくこの effect queue を replay して replica stream を構成する。Redis 互換の rewrite として、script `SPOP` は lowercase `srem` に固定、expire-family は lowercase `pexpireat` または `del`、script `INCRBYFLOAT` は lowercase `set key <value> KEEPTTL` に rewrite するようにした。`FUNCTION LOAD` まで巻き込まないよう effect-based replication は `EVAL*` / `FCALL*` に限定し、`replicaof_replication_propagates_function_load_and_fcall` も維持した。検証: targeted Rust PASS（`sync_replication_stream_rewrites_script_*`, `replicaof_replication_propagates_function_load_and_fcall`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`534 + 23 + 1`）；targeted external PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-scripting-argv-rewrite-20260310-235339/` with 3 single-case probes all `ok=1 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=14`。Smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-10/11.440-scripting-argv-rewrite/`（before `6bb29c5fa6`, after working tree, `RUNS=1 THREADS=1 CONNS=4 REQUESTS=2000 PRELOAD_REQUESTS=2000 PIPELINE=1 SIZE_RANGE=1-64`; `SET ops +5.78%`, `GET ops +9.92%`, `SET p99 -13.45%`, `GET p99 -11.19%`）。 |
| 637 | 2026-03-11 | 11.441 | DONE | isolated `unit/scripting` の frozen-time / expired-restore race bucket を targeted-first でクローズ。`RequestProcessor` 実行スコープに `CurrentProcessorScope` と `ScriptTimeSnapshot` を追加し、`TIME` / expiration 計算 / `RESTORE ABSTTL` が script/function 実行中は単一の frozen timestamp を共有するよう修正した。さらに `server_runtime` の active-expire tick を `script_execution_in_progress()` 中は skip するように変え、script 内で frozen deadline 付きに復元した key が background expire に先に消される race を止めた。exact regressions は request-lifecycle と TCP の両方で追加し、deterministic race probes `scripting_function_freezes_expiration_while_active_expire_runs` と `scripting_function_restore_keeps_frozen_ttl_under_active_expire` まで固定した。TLA+ は `formal/tla/specs/ScriptActiveExpireFreeze.tla` を追加し、bug cfg では期待どおり invariant violation、fixed cfg では TLC PASS を確認した。副作用で `DEBUG OBJECT` の expired debug-access を実装したが、missing key は引き続き `ERR no such key` へ絞り戻して unit regression を維持している。検証: direct Tcl repro against release `garnet-server` で `FCALL` / `EVAL` とも `PEXPIRETIME` が等しい正値を返すことを確認；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`545 + 23 + 1`）；external full-mode single-case probes は harness skip のまま no-failure；isolated rerun `RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/scripting ./redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` で `unit/scripting ok=307 err=2 ignore=26` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-scripting-isolated-11.441-20260311-005530/`、`Script block the time during execution` と `RESTORE expired keys with expiration time` は両方 `[ok]`。3-run smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-11/11.441-scripting-active-expire-freeze/` に保存し、`SET ops +0.01%`, `GET ops +3.60%`, `SET p99 -6.72%`, `GET p99 -13.71%` で非回帰を確認した。残件は isolated `unit/scripting` の `Script ACL check` 2 件のみ。 |
| 638 | 2026-03-11 | 11.442 | DONE | isolated `unit/scripting` の最後の residual bucket `redis.acl_check_cmd()` を targeted-first でクローズ。`ServerMetrics` の ACL state を単なる user set から minimal live profile map へ広げ、`ACL SETUSER` side effect で `on|off`, `+cmd`, `+@all`, `-cmd`, `-@all`, `~pattern`, `resetkeys` を parse して保存するようにした。scripting runtime は `redis.acl_check_cmd(...)` を `EVAL` / `FCALL` の両方へ公開し、current authenticated user に対して command permission と key-pattern permission を live profile から判定する。invalid command は Redis-compatible `ERR Invalid command passed to redis.acl_check_cmd()` を返す。exact TCP regression `scripting_acl_check_cmd_matches_external_scenario_for_eval_and_function` を追加し、Redis `tests/unit/scripting.tcl` の scenario を mirror した。検証: targeted Rust PASS；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`546 + 23 + 1`）；isolated rerun `RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/scripting ./redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` で `unit/scripting ok=309 err=0 ignore=26` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-scripting-isolated-11.442-20260311-011334/`。3-run smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-11/11.442-scripting-acl-check/` に保存し、`SET ops -2.10%`, `GET ops +1.62%`, `SET p99 +7.21%`, `GET p99 -5.59%` を確認。isolated `unit/scripting` lane はこれでゼロ化。 |

| 656 | 2026-03-11 | 11.460 | DONE | `unit/type/stream-cgroups` の残 1 本 `XREADGROUP CLAIM with two blocked clients` を exact TCP regression 化して解消した。根因は 2 段で、(1) blocked `XREADGROUP ... CLAIM` waiter が `claimable pending entry` を readiness predicate に含めていなかったこと、(2) same-key の後続 waiter は queue front になるまで command が一度も実行されず、per-client stream wait state が未登録のまま `blocking_wait_keys_ready` で永久に false 扱いされていたこと。修正として `BlockingXreadgroupWait` に `claim_min_idle_millis` を保持させ、`xreadgroup_waiter_is_ready` で `ClaimWaitReady` (`new entries` or `claimable pending`) を評価するよう変更し、同時に stream class で blocked wait state が未登録の queue-front client には 1 回だけ command 実行を許して wait metadata を seed できるようにした。TLA+ は新規 `formal/tla/specs/BlockingXreadgroupClaimWait.tla` と bug/fixed cfg を追加し、bug config で counterexample、fixed config で pass を確認。検証: targeted Rust PASS（`cargo test -p garnet-server xreadgroup_claim_ -- --nocapture`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`570 passed; 23 passed; 1 passed`）；targeted external `RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/type/stream-cgroups` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-143609/` with `ok=127 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=11`。follow-up full compatibility rerun では main full external が `ok=2251 err=2 timeout=1 ignore=306` となり、`stream-cgroups` timeout は消えた一方で tail residual として `BZPOPMIN/BZPOPMAX readraw in RESP3`, `BZMPOP readraw in RESP3`, `integration/redis-cli` `Piping raw protocol` が露出した。updated artifact: `docs/compatibility/compatibility-report.md`, result dir `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260311-143705/redis-runtest-external-full/`。 |
| 657 | 2026-03-11 | 11.461 | DONE | `BZPOPMIN/BZPOPMAX readraw in RESP3` と `BZMPOP readraw in RESP3` をクローズ。根因は blocking timeout/unblock helper `blocking_empty_response_for_command` が protocol-blind で、RESP3 接続でも RESP2 null array `*-1` を返していたこと。`blocking_zset_pop_timeout_returns_resp3_null_like_external_readraw_scenarios` を exact TCP regression として追加し、helper を `resp3` aware に変更して RESP3 では `_`、RESP2 では従来どおりの null forms を返すよう修正。検証: targeted Rust PASS（`cargo test -p garnet-server blocking_zset_pop_timeout_returns_resp3_null_like_external_readraw_scenarios -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p garnet-server bzmpop -- --nocapture`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`571 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）；isolated external `RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/type/zset` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-145357/` with `ok=324 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=0`。remaining main-full residual is `integration/redis-cli` `Piping raw protocol` timeout. |
| 658 | 2026-03-11 | 11.462 | DONE | 最後の main-full residual `integration/redis-cli` `Piping raw protocol` をクローズし、full compatibility baseline を再固定した。最初は Tcl harness 側を疑って isolated rerun と exact `redis-cli --pipe` Rust test を増やしたが、真因は Redis test fixture 側の wire formatだった。`tests/support/util.tcl` の `formatCommand` はすでに RESP を `\\r\\n` で閉じており、その文字列を `puts` で書くため command 間に `\\n` が 1 byte 余計に入る。Garnet は空の `\\r\\n` frame は無視していたが lone `\\n` separator は `ERR Protocol error` にしていたため、`Piping raw protocol` だけが落ちていた。対応として connection parser に lone LF separator の許容を追加し、exact regressions `protocol_accepts_tcl_puts_extra_lf_between_resp_commands`, `redis_cli_pipe_raw_protocol_external_scenario_round_trips_all_replies`, `redis_cli_pipe_mode_matches_external_scenario_when_repo_cli_is_available` を追加。検証: targeted Rust PASS; `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`574 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）；isolated external `integration/redis-cli` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-154805/` with `ok=51 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=1`；final full compatibility rerun PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260311-155023/redis-runtest-external-full/` with main full external `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374`, isolated `unit/scripting ok=309 err=0 ignore=26`, `unit/querybuf ok=4 err=0 ignore=0`, `unit/other ok=25 err=0 ignore=6`。 |
| 659 | 2026-03-11 | 11.463 | DONE | no-singledb baseline を current HEAD で取り直し、最初の実 residual を DB-aware string mutation/expiration slice としてクローズした。measurement では `RUNTEXT_SINGLEDB=0` full external at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-164258/` が main `ok=647 err=30 timeout=1 ignore=104` を返し、最初の大きな塊は `BITFIELD`, `SETBIT`/`BITCOUNT`, `PERSIST`, `APPEND` だった。根因は (1) `upsert_string_value_with_expiration_unix_millis` が auxiliary DB selected 時でも DB0 に書き戻していたこと、(2) `APPEND` と `PERSIST` が DB0 storage / expiration map を直接触っていたこと、(3) `connection_handler` の `SETBIT/BITFIELD` mutation detection が pre-state を DB0 で見ていて no-op dirty counter を誤検知していたこと。exact TCP regressions `multidb_string_mutations_and_persist_match_external_scenarios_over_tcp` と `multidb_setbit_bitfield_noop_do_not_increase_dirty_counter_like_external_scenario` を追加し、server 側では `write_string_value_in_current_db` を新設して auxiliary DB string writes を side-effect-free に統一、`APPEND` を DB-aware read/modify/write path に整理、`PERSIST` を `string_expiration_deadline` / `set_string_expiration_deadline` 経由へ修正、`pre_string_len_for_mutation_detection` に `selected_db` を通した。検証: targeted Rust PASS；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`576 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）；targeted no-singledb external `unit/bitfield` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-165752/` (`ok=18 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=1`) and `unit/bitops` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-170240/` (`ok=55 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=2`)。follow-up isolated reruns showed the remaining no-singledb residuals have moved outside the direct string-mutation family: `unit/expire` now reproduces only `Active expire should increment both expired_keys and expired_keys_active` and `unit/other` only `Check consistency of different data types after a reload`。Benchmarking was skipped per explicit user instruction because the machine was under concurrent workload. |
| 660 | 2026-03-11 | 11.464 | DONE | no-singledb `unit/expire` の残 1 本 `Active expire should increment both expired_keys and expired_keys_active` をクローズ。exact TCP regression `multidb_active_expire_increments_expired_keys_active_like_external_scenario` を追加した上で active-expire path を trace し、auxiliary DB expiration scan `expire_stale_auxiliary_keys_in_shard()` が per-key で `record_lazy_expired_keys(1)` を呼んだあと、最後に `record_active_expired_keys(expired.len())` も呼んでいることを特定した。これにより auxiliary active expiration だけ `expired_keys` が二重加算され、Redis `unit/expire` の `wait_for_condition { [s expired_keys] == 3 }` が不安定化していた。修正として lazy counter increment を削除し、active-expire accounting を `record_active_expired_keys(...)` に一本化した。manual release repro (`GARNET_BIND_ADDR=127.0.0.1:<port> target/release/garnet-server`) でも `expired_keys=3`, `expired_keys_active=3` を確認し、isolated external rerun は `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-172232/` で `unit/expire ok=76 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=3`。合わせて `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`577 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）。 |
| 661 | 2026-03-11 | 11.465 | DONE | no-singledb `unit/other` の最後の reload consistency residual をクローズした。最初は auxiliary-DB hash-field-expiration metadata を `DEBUG RELOAD` snapshot が落としていたため、`GRSNAP3` へ拡張して per-field expiration を保存・復元する修正を入れたが、external scenario はなお失敗し、差分を追うと reload 後に set key が 5 本だけ増える形だった。根因は auxiliary DB set hot-state の write-back semantics で、dirty set entry が hot cache にだけ存在して current-db `object_keys_snapshot` には現れず、`KEYS` / `DEBUG DIGEST` / reload snapshot enumeration が通常の set read (`SCARD`/`SMEMBERS`) と異なる keyspace を見ていたこと。対応として `materialize_set_hot_entries_for_db` を追加して snapshot/flush 前に dirty set hot entry を backing store へ materialize し、さらに `object_keys_snapshot` が current DB の hot set keys を含むよう修正して visibility を揃え、`flush_current_db_keys` で per-DB set hot state を明示的に clear するようにした。exact TCP regressions は既存の mixed dataset test `multidb_debug_reload_preserves_mixed_dataset_with_hash_field_expirations_like_external_other_scenario` に加えて `multidb_set_hot_entries_are_visible_to_keys_and_digest_across_debug_reload` を追加。検証: targeted Rust PASS (`cargo test -p garnet-server multidb_ -- --nocapture` -> `11 passed, 0 failed`); `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS (`579 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`); isolated external `RUNTEXT_SINGLEDB=0 RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/other` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-175500/` with `ok=25 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=6`。これで current HEAD で確認できていた no-singledb isolated residual (`unit/expire`, `unit/other`) は解消した。 |
| 662 | 2026-03-11 | 11.466 | DONE | no-singledb rebaseline 後に isolated `unit/scripting` の残 1 本 `Script delete the expired key` をクローズした。Redis test は active expire を止めた状態で `SET key value PX 1; after 2; DEBUG OBJECT key; EVAL "return redis.call('EXISTS','key')"` を実行し、`DEBUG OBJECT` が expired key をまだ見せることと、script access で最終的に key が削除されることの両方を要求する。根因は auxiliary-DB path の `read_string_value`, `key_exists`, `object_key_exists` が `with_expired_data_access(true)` を無視して常に `expire_key_if_needed()` を叩いていたことだった。修正として auxiliary-DB read/existence path でも `allow_expired_data_access()` を尊重するよう変更。検証: targeted Rust PASS（既存 exact regression `cargo test -p garnet-server scripting_deletes_expired_key_on_access_like_external_scenario -- --nocapture`）；`make fmt`; isolated external `RUNTEXT_SINGLEDB=0 RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/scripting` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-181029/` with `ok=313 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=22`。同時に no-singledb full rebaseline `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-180229/` を確認し、残件は main-full `unit/expire`, `unit/hyperloglog`, `unit/latency-monitor`, `keyspace notification hash(listpackex)` に絞れた。 |
| 663 | 2026-03-11 | 11.467 | DONE | no-singledb `unit/hyperloglog` の残 3 本をクローズ。まず exact external regressions `hyperloglog_sparse_thresholds_match_external_scenario_in_auxiliary_db`, `hyperloglog_sparse_stress_matches_external_scenario_in_auxiliary_db`, `hyperloglog_cache_invalidation_matches_external_scenario_in_auxiliary_db` を request-lifecycle tests に追加し、DB9 で `PFADD/PFCOUNT/PFDEBUG` は auxiliary DB を見ているのに `STRLEN` と `GETRANGE` だけ DB0 string store を直読している不整合を再現した。根因は HLL の sparse math ではなく selected-DB drift で、Redis `unit/hyperloglog.tcl` は `PFDEBUG ENCODING` を DB9 から、`STRLEN` と dirty-byte `GETRANGE 15 15` を DB0 から読まされていた。修正として `STRLEN` と `GETRANGE`/`SUBSTR` を `selected_db != 0` では `read_string_value()` / `object_key_exists()` に切り替え、他の auxiliary-string read semantics と整合させた。検証: targeted Rust PASS (`cargo test -p garnet-server hyperloglog_ -- --nocapture` -> `4 passed, 0 failed`); `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`582 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）；isolated external no-singledb PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-193527/` with `unit/hyperloglog ok=28 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=1`。follow-up mandatory task `11.468` として、helper 依存ではなく `DbName` 明示の invoke/read/write interface へ移行し implicit selected-DB helper を削る structural lane を backlog 化した。 |
| 664 | 2026-03-11 | 11.468 | DONE | MultiDB の structural follow-up として DB-explicit interface の first mechanical slice を入れた。`request_lifecycle.rs` に `KeyBytes = [u8]` と `DbKeyRef<'a> { db, key }` を導入し、existing owned key type `DbScopedKey` と役割分担を明確化。`string_store.rs` では `read_string_value`, `key_exists`, `object_key_exists`, `key_exists_any`, `key_exists_any_without_expiring` を `DbKeyRef` 必須に変更し、`object_store.rs` でも `object_read_raw`, `has_set_hot_entry`, `set_hot_payload_for_object_read`, `object_read` を同様に変換した。call site migration を `string_commands.rs`, `server_commands.rs`, `hash_commands.rs`, `migration.rs`, `connection_handler.rs`, `request_lifecycle.rs`, tests に展開し、`MOVE`, `COPY`, `INFO KEYSIZES` など「すでに logical DB が分かっているのに `with_selected_db(... current_request_selected_db())` で rediscover していた」箇所は helper peeking を除去した。設計・inventory は `docs/compatibility/multidb-db-explicit-interface-design-2026-03-11.md` に記録し、snapshot 時点で `current_request_selected_db` 161 call sites / `current_auxiliary_db_name` 29 call sites を残件として固定。exact regression `db_key_ref_reads_are_scoped_by_explicit_db_without_db0_fallback` を追加し、explicit `(DbName, key)` read API が DB0 fallthrough を起こさないことを固定した。検証: `cargo check -p garnet-server`; targeted Rust PASS（new regression + `hyperloglog_` lane）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS。follow-up `11.469` で write/delete/expiration/snapshot helpers と command invoke context 側の helper deletion を継続する。 |
| 665 | 2026-03-11 | 11.469 | DONE | DB-explicit lane の second mechanical slice として、string mutation / TTL lookup helper から ambient selected-DB peeking を外した。`string_store.rs` で `write_string_value`, `delete_string_value`, `upsert_string_value_for_migration`, `delete_string_key_for_migration`, `expiration_unix_millis`, `rewrite_existing_value_expiration` を `DbKeyRef` 必須へ変更し、`string_commands.rs`, `migration.rs`, `server_commands.rs`, `request_lifecycle.rs`, `connection_handler.rs` の call site を explicit `(DbName, key)` へ移行した。`selected_db_expiration_unix_millis_for_key` も `with_selected_db(...)` で helper に再発見させる形をやめ、`DbKeyRef::new(selected_db, key)` 直呼びへ変更。exact regressions として `db_key_ref_mutations_and_ttl_reads_are_scoped_by_explicit_db_without_db0_fallback` を追加し、既存 TCP exact scenario `multidb_string_mutations_and_persist_match_external_scenarios_over_tcp` も再実行して MultiDB string mutation semantics が壊れていないことを確認した。検証: `cargo check -p garnet-server`; targeted Rust PASS（`db_key_ref_`, `multidb_string_mutations_and_persist_match_external_scenarios_over_tcp`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`584 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）。設計メモも更新し、raw grep inventory は `current_auxiliary_db_name 29 -> 24` まで減少、`current_request_selected_db` count は call-site 明示化で増えるため raw count alone を success metric にしないと明記した。 |

| 670 | 2026-03-11 | 11.474 | DONE | DB-explicit lane の seventh mechanical slice として、production invoke/replay boundary を explicit `DbName` 必須に切り替えた。`RequestProcessor::execute(...)` を削除して `execute_in_db(...)` を導入し、non-DB wrappers `execute_with_client_context(...)`, `execute_with_client_no_touch(...)`, `execute_with_client_no_touch_in_transaction(...)` を撤去、内部 dispatch は private な current-context executor に閉じ込めた。`aof_replay.rs` では replay 中の `selected_db` を明示的に持ち回り、`SELECT` frame 成功時に replay state を更新するように修正したため、AOF replay が各 operation ごとに DB0 へ戻る不具合を解消した。exact regressions: `aof_replay::tests::replay_aof_operations_tracks_selected_db_across_select_commands`, `request_lifecycle::tests::execute_in_db_scopes_command_invocation_without_db0_fallback`。あわせて DB-explicit / HyperLogLog auxiliary-db regression で使う test harness に explicit DB variants を追加し、ambient selected-db に依存しない test shape に揃えた。検証: `cargo check -p garnet-server`; targeted Rust PASS（`cargo test -p garnet-server replay_aof_ -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p garnet-server execute_in_db_scopes_command_invocation_without_db0_fallback -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p garnet-server db_key_ref_ -- --nocapture`, `cargo test -p garnet-server hyperloglog_ -- --nocapture`）；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`589 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）。inventory 再計測では `current_request_selected_db(...) = 368`, `current_auxiliary_db_name(...) = 0`。 |
| 671 | 2026-03-11 | 11.475 | DONE | DB-explicit lane の eighth mechanical slice として、background/reprocessing 側の queued item と debug encoding state を DB-scoped に寄せた。`lazy_expired_keys_for_replication` は `DbKeyRef`/`DbScopedKey` で enqueue し、script replication effect は `selected_db` を明示引数で保持、`string_value_len_for_replication` と `key_type_snapshot_for_setkey_overwrite` は `DbKeyRef` 必須へ変更した。さらに `forced_list_quicklist_keys` / `forced_raw_string_keys` / `forced_set_encoding_floors` / `set_debug_ht_state` を `DbScopedKey` ベースに揃え、同名 key の DB 跨ぎで `OBJECT ENCODING` や `DEBUG HTSTATS-KEY` の内部 state が漏れないようにした。active-expire と auxiliary lazy-expire path も `DbName::default()` / auxiliary `DbName` を明示的に使って object delete・watch invalidation・replication queue へ伝搬するよう修正。exact regressions: `lazy_expire_replication_queue_preserves_auxiliary_db_name`, `script_replication_effects_preserve_selected_db`, `db_scoped_encoding_state_does_not_leak_between_databases`。検証: `cargo check -p garnet-server`; targeted Rust PASS（上記 3 テスト）; `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`592 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）。inventory 再計測では `current_auxiliary_db_name(...) = 0` を維持し、`current_request_selected_db(...) = 400` は direct helper call を `DbKeyRef::new(current_request_selected_db(), ...)` へ機械的に持ち上げた影響で増加したが、background helper 内の hidden DB rediscovery は減少した。 |
| 672 | 2026-03-11 | 11.476 | DONE | DB-explicit lane の ninth mechanical slice として watch-version helper の ambient selected-db lookup を削除した。`bump_watch_version` と `bump_watch_version_server_origin` を `DbKeyRef` 必須へ変更し、object/string/server/set/zset/geo の mutation path は command boundary で `DbKeyRef::new(current_request_selected_db(), ...)` を作って watch invalidation に渡す形へ統一した。これにより helper 自身は thread-local DB を見なくなり、background/maintenance path はすでに explicit `DbName` を渡しているため DB0 fallback の hidden path をさらに削った。exact regression `watch_versions_are_scoped_by_explicit_db` を追加し、DB9 の `SET shared db9` が DB9 の watch slot だけを進めて DB0 同名 key の version を変えないことを固定した。検証: `make fmt`; targeted Rust PASS（`cargo test -p garnet-server watch_versions_are_scoped_by_explicit_db -- --nocapture`）; `make test-server` PASS（`593 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）。inventory 再計測では `current_auxiliary_db_name(...) = 0`, `current_request_selected_db(...) = 426`。増分は helper 削除の副作用として boundary-side `DbKeyRef` construction が増えたためで、watch-version helper 内の hidden lookup 自体は消えている。 |
| 673 | 2026-03-11 | 11.478 | DONE | MultiDB の次の structural refactor に入る前提として、全体設計 doc `docs/compatibility/multidb-db-model-and-command-boundary-redesign-2026-03-11.md` を追加した。内容は mechanical helper cleanup ではなく architectural target の固定で、現状 `RequestProcessor` が `db0 = sharded Tsavorite`, `db>0 = auxiliary HashMap`, `selected_db = thread-local request context`, `SWAPDB = snapshot + flush + reimport` という構造を取っていること、その結果 `SWAPDB` が `O(entry_count + payload_bytes)` になっていることを整理した上で、Valkey と original `.NET Garnet` の実装比較を書き下した。Valkey 側は `client->db` / `serverDb` ownership と `dbSwapDatabases()` による DB-content swap + watcher/blocker fixup、`.NET Garnet` 側は `RespServerSession.activeDbId` / `storageSession` / `GarnetDatabaseSession` による DB-bound command execution と `TrySwapDatabases()` の DB-object swap を参照し、それを踏まえて `garnet-rs` の redesign target を `logical DB identity` と `physical storage ownership` の分離、`DbCatalog` + `DbHandle`、storage-owned state の `DbRuntime` 集約、`KeyScoped` / `DbScoped` / `Global` command taxonomy、mapping-based `SWAPDB` へ固定した。合わせて TLA+ / test / benchmark gate も設計に含めた。docs-only iteration のためテストは未実施。 |
| 643 | 2026-03-11 | 11.447 | DONE | `integration/redis-cli` の残件 `DEBUG POPULATE` / RDB dump admin precondition を targeted-first で前進させた。Redis `debug.c` 互換で `DEBUG POPULATE <count> [prefix] [size]` を実装し、既存 key は上書きせず `prefix:index` の string key を作るようにした。exact regressions として request-lifecycle `debug_populate_creates_requested_string_keys_without_overwriting_existing_values` と TCP integration `debug_populate_matches_external_redis_cli_rdb_dump_precondition` を追加。検証: targeted Rust PASS；`make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`552 + 23 + 1`）；targeted external `Dumping an RDB - functions only: no/yes` rerun により `DEBUG POPULATE` unknown-subcommand failure は消え、次 blocker が `DEBUG RELOAD NOSAVE` no-op による `assert_equal {} [r get should-not-exist]` へ前進したことを確認。Smoke benchmark artifact は `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-11/11.447-debug-populate/`（before `a0355b9377`, after working tree, `RUNS=1 THREADS=1 CONNS=4 REQUESTS=2000 PRELOAD_REQUESTS=2000 PIPELINE=1 SIZE_RANGE=1-64`; `SET ops -2.22%`, `GET ops -2.00%`, `SET p99 +0.00%`, `GET p99 -4.37%`）。 |
| 650 | 2026-03-11 | 11.454 | DONE | `I-002` の次の no-singledb residual として `unit/info-keysizes` をクローズ。manual parallel rerun で見えていた `server exited` は port collision だったため、isolated lane を sequential に再実行し、実 residual を `Test SWAPDB` と `DEBUG RELOAD reset keysizes` の 2 件へ絞った。根因は `INFO KEYSIZES` の default histogram が caller selected DB をそのまま使っていたことで、`SELECT 1` 下では `db1` の histogram を `db0` として集計した上で auxiliary pass でも再度 `db1` を数えていた。`render_keysizes_info_payload` を `with_selected_db(DbName::default(), ...)` で固定し、exact regressions として request-lifecycle `info_keysizes_keeps_db0_histogram_when_current_client_selected_db_is_nonzero`、TCP `multidb_info_keysizes_swapdb_and_debug_reload_match_external_scenarios_over_tcp` を追加。検証: targeted Rust PASS; `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS（`563 passed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`）；external `RUNTEXT_SINGLEDB=0 RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/info-keysizes` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-121557/` with `ok=18 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=8`。Smoke benchmark artifact: `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-11/11.454-multidb-info-keysizes-selecteddb/` (`SET ops +18.01%`, `GET ops +6.92%`, `SET p99 -27.20%`, `GET p99 -11.89%` vs `a334a5b760`). |
| 651 | 2026-03-11 | 11.455 | DONE | `I-002` の次の no-singledb residual として external `unit/type/list` の DB-scoped blocking wake path をクローズ。`Linked LMOVEs` を manual repro で DB0/DB9 比較した結果、DB0 では即時 wake、DB9 では producer `RPUSH` ACK 直後に `list1{t}=foo`, `blocked_clients=2` のままという差を確認し、`redis_deferring_client` が no-singledb で `SELECT 9` を使うことから、blocking wait readiness が DB0 を見ているのが根因だと特定した。対応として `BlockingWaitKey` を `{db,key,class}` へ拡張し、connection path の list/zset/stream blocking wait-key construction に `selected_db` を通し、`has_ready_blocking_waiters()` は各 `wait_key.db()` 下で `expire_key_if_needed + object_read` を評価するよう修正。あわせて blocked-client count の公開順序を queue registration/cleanup と整合させ、`blocked_clients` が未登録 waiter を先に見せないようにした。TLA+ は `formal/tla/specs/BlockingCountVisibility.tla` を追加し、`BlockingCountVisibility_bug.cfg` で counterexample、`BlockingCountVisibility_fixed.cfg` で pass を確認。exact regressions: DB9 TCP integration `linked_blmove_chain_is_observable_without_intermediate_residue`、connection-handler unit `xreadgroup_claim_blocking_wait_detection_supports_claim_and_multiple_streams` の DB assertion。検証: targeted Rust PASS; `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS (`563 passed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`); targeted external single `Linked LMOVEs` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-124756/`; isolated external `RUNTEXT_SINGLEDB=0 RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/type/list` rerun at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260311-124817/` improved to `ok=112 err=2 timeout=1 ignore=9`, removing `Linked LMOVEs`, `Circular BRPOPLPUSH`, `BRPOPLPUSH timeout`, `SWAPDB awakes blocked client`, and `BLPOP ... reprocessing command`. Benchmark was explicitly de-emphasized for this slice because the host machine was under concurrent user workload; noisy smoke artifacts were kept only as reference under `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-11/11.455-multidb-blocking-wait-db-scope/`. |

| 677 | 2026-03-12 | 11.479 | DONE | SWAPDB 非ゼロ DB 間の内容入れ替えを再実装し、DB1 と DB2 の `string/object` を含む全補助 DB state を両替する経路を追加。`swap_auxiliary_databases` を追加して `DBScopedKey` まわり state（`forced_*`, `set_debug_ht_state`, `set_object_hot_state`）を再マップし、同一 DB swap fast-path と同様に `index1 != 0 && index2 != 0` 時は snapshot/flush/reimport を回避。`execute_command_line_in_db` の external scenario 由来テストを先行追加し、`SWAPDB 1 2` 後の同名キー型切替 (`TYPE` / `LRANGE` / `GET` で WRONGTYPE) を固定。`make test-server` (`594 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`) と新規テストが PASS。 |
| 678 | 2026-03-11 | 11.480 | DONE | Introduced the first `DbCatalog` slice in `request_lifecycle`: DB0-owned runtime state (`string/object stores`, expirations, hash-field expiration maps, expiration counters, key registries) now lives under `DbCatalog::main_db_runtime`, and auxiliary DB state under `DbCatalog::auxiliary_databases`, instead of both hanging directly off `RequestProcessor`. This is the first structural cut toward a DB-first ownership model and removes the most obvious “DB0 is special because it is top-level state” shape. Validation: `make fmt`; `make test-server` (`594 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`). Mechanical-coupling note: landed in the same working-tree slice as `11.481` because splitting catalog introduction from side-state migration would leave a half-moved ownership model with duplicated DB-owned state on `RequestProcessor`. |
| 679 | 2026-03-11 | 11.481 | DONE | Moved DB-owned side state behind the new catalog boundary without changing semantics: forced encoding/debug state (`forced_list_quicklist_keys`, `forced_raw_string_keys`, `forced_set_encoding_floors`, `set_object_hot_state`, `set_debug_ht_state`) and key access metadata (`key_lru_access_millis`, `key_lfu_frequency`) now live under `DbCatalog::side_state` instead of directly on `RequestProcessor`. This keeps the DB-ownership refactor coherent and prepares the next lane where these structures stop being `DbScopedKey` remap tables and become per-DB state. Validation: `make fmt`; `make test-server` (`594 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`). |
| 680 | 2026-03-11 | 11.482 | DONE | Re-implemented `SWAPDB` as logical-DB storage-binding swap plus control-plane fixup, eliminating the old snapshot/flush/reimport path for DB0 involvement and removing payload-byte / entry-count migration from the steady-state swap path. Supporting slices completed the typed DB-catalog boundary, hid raw auxiliary storage maps behind `AuxiliaryDbStorageMap`, moved simple side-state and object-access metadata into swappable per-DB buckets, and finally moved dirty set hot-state off flat `DbScopedKey` remap tables. The remaining work on swap is bounded bookkeeping only (tracking invalidation and other control-plane/session state), not data migration. Coverage now includes exact Rust regressions for blocked waiters, watch/expire behavior, encoding/debug state, object access metadata, and dirty set hot-state across swapped logical DBs; full external compatibility reruns remain green at `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374`. |
| 684 | 2026-03-11 | 11.486 | DONE | Closed the remaining `MIGRATE` Redis-target parity gap by switching the command path from the old Garnet-only `GRN1` dump blob to Redis-compatible DUMP/RESTORE payloads for string/list/hash/set/zset/stream values, including TTL carriage and exact remote `RESTORE` interop with real Redis targets. `DUMP` now returns the same Redis-style payload family used by `MIGRATE`, and `RESTORE` accepts both legacy Garnet debug blobs and Redis-compatible object dumps. Added exact ignored local-Redis regressions for string+TTL and object datasets (`migrate_to_local_redis_target_preserves_string_and_ttl_like_external_dump_scenario`, `migrate_to_local_redis_target_preserves_object_dataset_like_external_dump_scenario`), plus an ordered-hash preserve fix so Redis `HGETALL` field order remains stable across dump/restore. Validation: targeted Rust PASS (`dump_restore_and_restore_asking_roundtrip_string_payloads`, `migrate_moves_key_between_two_live_servers_like_external_dump_scenario`, `migrate_copy_replace_and_keys_follow_external_dump_scenarios`, `hash_hgetall_preserves_payload_order_across_restore_match_external_scenarios`); targeted ignored local-Redis PASS for both new exact tests; isolated external `unit/dump` PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260317-031247/` (`ok=14 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=14`, CLI probes PASS); `make test-server` PASS with verified counts (`681 passed; 0 failed; 16 ignored`, plus `23 passed`, plus `1 passed`). |
| 685 | 2026-03-11 | 11.487 | DONE | Closed the remaining manual `FAILOVER` topology-convergence backlog by proving the remote-peer path end-to-end: source/target-local cluster snapshots were already updated directly during promotion/demotion, and the remaining observer-node convergence is now covered by exact integration `cluster_failover_command_converges_observer_redirections_via_gossip_manager`, which runs the real command path plus cluster-manager gossip/update merge and verifies that a third node flips its live `MOVED` redirection to the promoted replica. Validation: targeted Rust PASS (`failover_` exact suite including `failover_promotes_connected_replica_and_demotes_source`, `failover_rejects_unknown_target_even_with_connected_replica`, `cluster_failover_command_updates_source_and_target_redirections`, `cluster_failover_command_converges_observer_redirections_via_gossip_manager` => `11 passed; 0 failed`); targeted external `integration/failover` probe PASS at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260317-032128/`; `make test-server` PASS with verified counts (`682 passed; 0 failed; 16 ignored`, plus `23 passed`, plus `1 passed`). |
| 688 | 2026-03-12 | 11.482 support slice | DONE | Stabilized the in-flight DB-catalog / `SWAPDB` lane and closed the remaining full-compat regressions found after the rerun. | 689 | 2026-03-12 | 11.483 support slice | DONE | Started the explicit-DB command-boundary cleanup by moving object access metadata off raw `RedisKey` and onto `DbScopedKey`. `record_key_access`, `clear_key_access`, `key_lru_millis`, `key_idle_seconds`, `set_key_idle_seconds`, `set_key_frequency`, and `key_frequency` now require `DbKeyRef`, and command/object/string paths pass the logical DB explicitly instead of letting metadata silently collide across databases. Added regression `db_scoped_object_access_metadata_does_not_leak_between_databases` to prove `OBJECT FREQ` / `OBJECT IDLETIME` stay isolated for same-name keys in DB0 vs DB9, while keeping `execute_with_client_no_touch_is_scoped_per_request` green after the API change. | 690 | 2026-03-12 | 11.482 support slice | DONE | Moved the remaining simple `SWAPDB` side-state off flat `DbScopedKey` remap tables and into per-DB buckets so DB0<->DBn swaps can exchange those structures without per-entry key rewriting. | 691 | 2026-03-12 | 11.482 support slice | DONE | Removed the last unbounded per-key `SWAPDB` remap lane by restructuring `set_object_hot_state` into per-DB buckets plus a bounded global LRU token queue. Added regression `swapdb_zero_and_nonzero_preserves_dirty_set_hot_state` so dirty in-memory `SADD` state that has not yet been materialized to the object store still follows `SWAPDB 0 1`, and kept `swapdb_zero_and_nonzero_preserves_object_access_metadata` green on the new structure. | 692 | 2026-03-12 | 11.483 support slice | DONE | Started pushing the object-store API itself onto explicit DB scope instead of letting helper methods rediscover `selected_db` from request-local state. Added `KeyRef` so `DbKeyRef` no longer stores raw `&[u8]` directly, changed `load_list_object` / `save_list_object` to require `DbKeyRef`, and rewired `list_commands.rs` plus the `SORT ... STORE` list sink in `string_commands.rs` to pass the logical DB explicitly at the command boundary. This removes another object-store helper family that previously rediscovered `selected_db` internally while keeping the external command surface unchanged. Validation: `make fmt`; targeted cargo tests for `list_commands_roundtrip_over_object_store`, `additional_list_commands_cover_common_redis_semantics`, and `sort_store_quicklist_debug_object_matches_external_scenario`; `make test-server` (`603 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored; 23 passed; 1 passed`); command-coverage workflow rerun PASS with `redis_runtest_full_external` summary `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260312-160738/redis-runtest-external-full`. |
| 694 | 2026-03-12 | 11.483 support slice | DONE | Continued the explicit-DB execution-boundary cleanup through the set object-store lane. Rewired `set_commands.rs` to pass the logical DB explicitly at the command boundary for direct set commands and store-result paths, and updated the zset fallback path that reads a set as a zset-like input to use the same typed DB-scoped key boundary. | 696 | 2026-03-12 | 11.483 support slice | DONE | Continued the explicit-DB execution-boundary cleanup through the stream object-store lane. Changed `load_stream_object` / `save_stream_object` to require `DbKeyRef`, rewired `stream_commands.rs` to pass the logical DB explicitly for stream reads, mutations, consumer-group operations, and blocking-related state transitions, and removed another large object-store family that previously rediscovered `selected_db` inside storage helpers before touching memory state. In the same tracker update, recorded the greenfield architecture backlog (`11.490`-`11.497`) plus a short appendix checklist so the next design iterations can start from concrete entry points instead of re-deriving the same sketch. | 697 | 2026-03-12 | 11.490 | DONE | Wrote the greenfield target design for a unified typed KV runtime in [docs/performance/design-unified-typed-kv-runtime-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-unified-typed-kv-runtime-2026-03-12.md). The document defines why the current split `string_store` / `object_store` model is structurally expensive, proposes a `DbRuntime`-owned typed `EntryRecord` / `EntryValue` storage model with one shard lookup and one overwrite path, specifies how expiry/watch/access metadata should be co-owned with the entry/DB runtime, and lays out a staged migration path from the current dual-store implementation toward unified storage and later owner-thread mutable runtime objects. Validation: document-only iteration; no code or compatibility artifacts changed. |
| 698 | 2026-03-12 | 11.491 | DONE | Wrote the greenfield target design for a typed mutation op-log and shared durability ledger in [docs/performance/design-typed-mutation-oplog-and-durability-ledger-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-typed-mutation-oplog-and-durability-ledger-2026-03-12.md). The document explains why the current split between command rewrite, `WAIT` special-casing, and offline-only AOF primitives is structurally wrong, proposes a `MutationRecord`-driven ordered op-log with monotonic frontiers for `applied`, `replication`, `local_append`, `local_fsync`, `replica_ack`, and `replica_durable`, and maps `WAIT` / `WAITAOF` onto that shared ledger plus a staged migration from the current implementation. Validation: document-only iteration; no code or compatibility artifacts changed. |
| 699 | 2026-03-12 | 11.492 | DONE | Wrote the greenfield metadata taxonomy and ownership design in [docs/performance/design-entry-local-metadata-ownership-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-entry-local-metadata-ownership-2026-03-12.md). The document classifies current metadata into canonical entry/value metadata, DB-local indexes, rebuildable caches, and coordination ledgers; maps current lanes such as key expiration, hash-field expiration, LFU/LRU, encoding hints, set hot-state, debug state, registries, and watch versions into that taxonomy; and defines which categories must survive `SWAPDB`, replication, and persistence. Validation: document-only iteration; no code or compatibility artifacts changed. |
| 700 | 2026-03-12 | 11.493 | DONE | Wrote the greenfield command-boundary redesign in [docs/performance/design-command-execution-scopes-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-command-execution-scopes-2026-03-12.md). The document separates execution scope from routing metadata, defines typed `KeyLocal` / `DbLocal` / `Global` handler boundaries and handle objects, explains why `KeyAccessPattern` and first-key routing are not sufficient semantic scopes, classifies multi-key and control-plane commands correctly, and covers how transactions, scripts, replay, and background tasks should enter the same explicit scope planner instead of reaching for ambient selected-DB state. Validation: document-only iteration; no code or compatibility artifacts changed. |
| 701 | 2026-03-12 | 11.494 | DONE | Wrote the greenfield DB ownership redesign in [docs/performance/design-first-class-db-runtime-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-first-class-db-runtime-2026-03-12.md). The document defines `DbRuntimeId` plus a logical binding table, makes every logical DB use the same `DbRuntime` shape instead of the current DB0 `MainDbRuntime` versus auxiliary-db split, classifies which state belongs inside the runtime versus in lightweight logical-name ledgers, and specifies `SWAPDB` as binding swap plus logical fixup with O(1) data movement. It also covers background tasks, `FLUSHDB` / `FLUSHALL`, `MOVE`, `MIGRATE`, lifetime/retirement rules, and a staged migration away from the current architecture. Validation: document-only iteration; no code or compatibility artifacts changed. |
| 702 | 2026-03-12 | 11.495 | DONE | Wrote the typed key-boundary design in [docs/performance/design-typed-key-api-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-typed-key-api-2026-03-12.md). The document records the fresh codebase inventory (`current_request_selected_db()` `722`, `DbKeyRef::new(...)` `642`, `RedisKey::from(...)` `182`), defines the target internal key type set (`KeyRef`, `OwnedKey`, `DbKeyRef`, `DbScopedKey`), states where raw `&[u8]` remains acceptable versus forbidden, classifies the remaining raw-key paths by command-body churn, runtime helpers, owned-key maps, and logical ledgers, and lays out the migration plan plus grep gates needed to finish the transition. Validation: document-only iteration; no code or compatibility artifacts changed. |
| 703 | 2026-03-12 | 11.496 | DONE | Wrote the live control-plane redesign in [docs/performance/design-live-control-plane-topology-snapshot-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-live-control-plane-topology-snapshot-2026-03-12.md). The document captures the current split between connection-layer `WAIT`/live `CLUSTER` handling, request-handler stubs, replication ACK state, and offline-only AOF primitives; defines a unified versioned `ControlPlaneSnapshot` plus per-connection routing-mode overlay; separates authoritative topology/replication/durability fields from derived renderings; and specifies how routing, `CLUSTER *`, `READONLY/READWRITE`, `FAILOVER`, `WAIT`, and `WAITAOF` should all consume the same control-plane API. Validation: document-only iteration; no code or compatibility artifacts changed. |
| 704 | 2026-03-12 | 11.497 | DONE | Wrote the owner-thread mutable runtime-object design in [docs/performance/design-owner-thread-mutable-runtime-objects-2026-03-12.md](/Users/kazuki-matsuda/dev/src/github.com/microsoft/garnet/docs/performance/design-owner-thread-mutable-runtime-objects-2026-03-12.md). The document explains why the current deserialize-mutate-reserialize object-store model is structurally wrong for owner-thread execution, treats the existing `set_object_hot_state` as proof of the right direction, defines canonical runtime-object ownership for `set`, `zset`, and `stream`, specifies object identity, dirty-generation tracking, persistence/replication serialization boundaries, background dirty-object hooks, and `SWAPDB` interaction, and sets the implementation order to set then zset then stream. This slice also removed redundant `with_selected_db(...)` wrapping from watch capture, migration export, blocking object lookup, auxiliary expire cleanup, and the selected-db existence helper in `connection_handler.rs`. | 708 | 2026-03-12 | 11.483 support slice | DONE | Continued the explicit-DB command-boundary cleanup through the set/zset/geo store-result helper lane. `store_set_result`, `store_zset_result`, and `store_geosearch_result` now take `DbKeyRef` instead of raw key bytes, and their overwrite/delete helpers no longer rediscover `selected_db` from request-local state before expiring, deleting, re-saving, or emitting keyspace notifications for the destination key. | 736 | 2026-03-14 | 11.484 | DONE | Closed the remaining cluster command-ownership gap by moving `READONLY` / `READWRITE` onto the request command path and making the toggle semantically effective. Added request-scoped `RequestConnectionEffects` in `request_lifecycle`, plumbed command-side connection effects through direct execution, owner-thread execution, blocking execution, and `EXEC` transaction replay, and removed the old `READONLY` / `READWRITE` connection-fast-path intercept from `connection_handler`. `server_commands` now emits `+OK` and records the per-connection cluster read-only effect when cluster mode is attached, while non-cluster behavior remains the same `ERR This instance has cluster support disabled`. On the routing side, `cluster_error_for_command` now honors read-only mode for non-mutating commands when the local worker is a replica of the slot owner, so reads can execute locally on replicas while writes still return `MOVED`. Added exact regressions for routing (`cluster_readonly_allows_local_replica_reads_but_not_writes`), direct request execution effects (`readonly_and_readwrite_emit_cluster_read_only_connection_effects`), and TCP behavior including `MULTI/EXEC` toggle application (`cluster_mode_readonly_and_readwrite_return_ok`). | 737 | 2026-03-14 | 11.485 | DONE | Unified `WAIT` ownership onto the command path and removed the stale duplicate semantics split. `server_commands::handle_wait` now parses `WAIT`, emits request-scoped connection effects for top-level command execution, and uses the attached replication coordinator ACK ledger for immediate script-time ack snapshots; the old connection-layer `WAIT` fast path was deleted and replaced with post-execution materialization that waits on the same downstream ACK ledger using the connection's tracked replication target offset. | 738 | 2026-03-14 | 11.486 support slice | DONE | Replaced the old `MIGRATE -> +NOKEY` fast path with a real selected-DB command-path subset and anchored it with exact Rust regressions before any broader validation. `server_commands::handle_migrate` now parses and executes a standalone DB-scoped subset covering `COPY`, `REPLACE`, `AUTH`, `AUTH2`, and `KEYS`, validates Redis argument/error shapes (including `KEYS` requiring an empty positional key), lazily expires source keys before planning, preserves per-key TTL in the exported payload, and deletes source keys only after the target acknowledges restore when `COPY` is absent. `migration.rs` gained a live remote execution path over RESP (`AUTH`/`SELECT`/`RESTORE`) plus exact target-error / IOERR surfacing, and the connection-layer `MIGRATE` intercept was removed so command execution now owns the behavior. Exact coverage was added with parser/validation regressions and two live two-server TCP integration tests that mirror the touched Redis `unit/dump` scenarios (`migrate_moves_key_between_two_live_servers_like_external_dump_scenario`, `migrate_copy_replace_and_keys_follow_external_dump_scenarios`). Validation: targeted cargo tests PASS (`cargo test -p garnet-server migrate_ -- --nocapture` => `6 passed; 0 failed`); regression-adjacent slowlog/admin tests PASS; `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`624 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`). Residual gap intentionally kept on active `11.486`: this slice still uses Garnet dump payloads for remote `RESTORE`, so full Redis-target DUMP parity and replication/AOF rewrite semantics for operational `MIGRATE` are not done yet. |
| 739 | 2026-03-14 | 11.487 support slice | DONE | Landed the first standalone/manual `FAILOVER` command slice on the real command path instead of the old cluster-disabled stub. `server_commands::handle_failover` now parses `ABORT`, `TO host port`, `FORCE`, and `TIMEOUT`, validates Redis argument/runtime error shapes, prepares a request-scoped failover side effect, and returns exact standalone errors for zero timeout, missing target/timeout under `FORCE`, non-replica mode, unknown target, and no-failover-in-progress aborts. `RedisReplicationCoordinator` gained a manual failover state machine plus downstream replica endpoint tracking, actual local listener-port announcement/capture (`REPLCONF LISTENING-PORT`), target catch-up waiting on the replication ACK ledger, promotion via `REPLICAOF NO ONE`, and source demotion to follow the promoted target. `FAILOVER` was also removed from replication rewrite passthrough so it is not forwarded to downstream replicas, and exact coverage was added for parser/runtime validation plus live two-server failover success and bad-target rejection (`failover_promotes_connected_replica_and_demotes_source`, `failover_rejects_unknown_target_even_with_connected_replica`). Validation: targeted cargo tests PASS (`cargo test -p garnet-server failover_ -- --nocapture` => `9 passed; 0 failed`); `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`627 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`); command-coverage workflow full rerun PASS with stable external summary `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260314-191051/redis-runtest-external-full/`. | 740 | 2026-03-14 | 11.488 design update | DONE | Wrote `docs/performance/design-live-aof-durability-tracking-2026-03-14.md` as the prerequisite design update for `WAITAOF`. The doc records the current baseline (`WAIT` is real, `WAITAOF` is still a stub, `tsavorite::AofWriter` exists only as an offline primitive), defines the missing live durability ledger (`local_append_offset`, `local_fsync_offset`, per-replica durable offsets), and proposes a staged runtime that fits the current frame-based replication architecture before any deeper typed-oplog refactor. Validation: docs-only iteration, no tests run. |
| 741 | 2026-03-14 | 11.488 support slice | DONE | Landed the first live AOF durability runtime slice without changing `WAITAOF` semantics yet. Added `aof_durability.rs` with a background `LiveAofDurabilityRuntime` built on `tsavorite::AofWriter`, supporting `appendfsync always/everysec/no` and publishing monotonic `local_append_offset` / `local_fsync_offset` frontiers through a shared in-process ledger. `RequestProcessor` now derives runtime configuration from `appendonly`, `appendfilename`, `dir`, and `appendfsync`, initializes the runtime at server startup when `appendonly=yes`, and exposes the local frontier snapshot for exact regression tests. The existing write-publication boundary was reused by wiring `RedisReplicationCoordinator::publish_write_frame` to also publish local AOF frames, so the first durability slice rides the current frame-based replication architecture rather than inventing a second publication path. Exact coverage added: module tests for `always`, `everysec`, and `no` fsync policies plus integration `publish_write_frame_advances_local_aof_frontiers_when_appendonly_enabled`. Validation: `cargo check -p garnet-server --tests`; targeted cargo tests PASS (`live_aof_runtime_ -- --nocapture`, `publish_write_frame_advances_local_aof_frontiers_when_appendonly_enabled -- --nocapture`); `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`631 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`); command-coverage workflow full rerun PASS with stable external summary `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260314-193425/redis-runtest-external-full/`. Generated compatibility artifacts did not change, so no matrix/report diff was committed. |
| 742 | 2026-03-14 | 11.488 support slice | DONE | Tightened the local AOF durability ledger so publication now yields exact append targets instead of forcing later readers to rediscover them. `LiveAofDurabilityRuntime` now bootstraps `next_append_target`, `local_append_offset`, and `local_fsync_offset` from the existing AOF tail at startup, computes the post-append target synchronously in `publish_frame`, and propagates that target through `RequestProcessor::publish_local_aof_frame` and `RedisReplicationCoordinator::publish_write_frame` as `PublishedWriteFrontiers { replication_offset, local_aof_append_offset }`. Connection-side replication publication was updated to track the returned replication frontier directly instead of re-reading a global counter after publish, and exact regressions now cover both bootstrapping from an existing AOF file and the returned append target from the shared write-publication boundary. Validation: `cargo check -p garnet-server --tests`; targeted cargo tests PASS (`live_aof_runtime_ -- --nocapture`, `publish_write_frame_advances_local_aof_frontiers_when_appendonly_enabled -- --nocapture`); `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`632 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`); command-coverage workflow full rerun PASS with stable external summary `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260314-195317/redis-runtest-external-full/`. Generated compatibility artifacts did not change, so no matrix/report diff was committed. |

| 744 | 2026-03-14 | 11.489 support slice | DONE | Fixed the local `WAITAOF` timing semantics for `appendfsync everysec` by removing the unintended immediate first fsync tick. `LiveAofDurabilityRuntime` now drives the everysec worker with `tokio::time::interval_at(now + everysec_interval, everysec_interval)` instead of `interval(...)`, so `WAITAOF 1 0 <short-timeout>` can no longer report local durability before the first configured interval elapses. Added unit regression `live_aof_runtime_everysec_policy_does_not_fsync_before_first_tick`, kept the exact Rust regressions mirroring the external `unit/wait` local scenarios, and validated focused external coverage with isolated `unit/wait` PASS. Mechanical coupling note: this commit also stages the remaining `DbName::fixture()` replacements in mixed test files (`connection_handler.rs`, `tests.rs`, `request_lifecycle/tests.rs`) because iteration 743 removed `DbName: Default`; leaving those test-only call sites behind would keep the tree uncompilable. Residual gap intentionally kept on active `11.489`: `numreplicas > 0` still returns a local-only response and durable-replica tracking is not implemented yet. |
| 745 | 2026-03-15 | 11.488 / 11.489 | DONE | Closed the remaining live durability / `WAITAOF` lane in one mechanically coupled slice because replica durable-offset visibility and `WAITAOF numreplicas` semantics share the same control-frame and ledger changes. Replicas now persist the incoming replication stream into local AOF when `appendonly=yes`, track the highest replication offset whose local AOF append target has actually been fsynced, and answer `REPLCONF GETACK *` with `REPLCONF ACK <applied-offset> FACK <fsynced-replication-offset>` following the same shape as Valkey. Primaries now keep downstream applied and durable ACK frontiers separately, `WAITAOF` immediate/script-time responses read the durable frontier, and the connection-path materialization waits on local fsync progress plus replica durable offsets instead of returning a local-only stub when `numreplicas > 0`. Exact Rust coverage added: parser regressions for `REPLCONF ACK ... FACK ...`, plus network integration tests mirroring Redis `tests/unit/wait.tcl` scenarios `WAITAOF replica copy before fsync` and `WAITAOF master isn't configured to do AOF`. This run confirms the remaining hidden gap is not broad command incompatibility but expiration/accounting behavior under pause/latency measurement and a pubsub/keyspace-notify timeout once the full no-skip profile is enabled. |
| 747 | 2026-03-15 | 11.498 | DONE | Fixed the no-skip `CLIENT PAUSE` expire-accounting regression on MultiDB auxiliary databases. Added exact TCP regression `client_pause_write_defers_expired_keys_stats_until_unpause_like_external_scenario`, which reproduces the external `tests/unit/pause.tcl` sequence on DB 9 (`MULTI`, two `SET PX 10`, queued `CLIENT PAUSE WRITE`, logical expiry during pause, then `CLIENT UNPAUSE` + forced `GET`) and asserts that `expired_keys` stays stable while paused before advancing by 2 after unpause. Root cause was the auxiliary-DB branch of `expire_key_if_needed_in_shard`: it reported logical expiry during pause but still emitted lazy-expire accounting / keyspace-notify / replication side effects. The fix now returns logical expiry early under pause for auxiliary DBs, matching the main-runtime path. Validation: targeted cargo PASS (`client_pause_write_defers_expired_keys_stats_until_unpause_like_external_scenario`); isolated external PASS (`garnet-rs/tests/interop/redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` with `RUNTEXT_SINGLEDB=0` and `--single unit/pause --only "Test both active and passive expires are skipped during client pause"` => `ok=1 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=1`, result dir `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260315-011332/`); `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`642 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`). |
| 748 | 2026-03-15 | 11.499 | DONE | Fixed the no-skip MultiDB latency-monitor regression for large expiring auxiliary hot sets. Added exact TCP regression `latency_of_expire_events_are_collected_like_external_scenario`, which reproduces `tests/unit/latency-monitor.tcl` on DB 9 (`CONFIG SET latency-monitor-threshold 20`, scripting-enabled `EVAL` million-member `SADD`, `PEXPIRE mybigkey 50`, wait for `DBSIZE == 0`, then assert `LATENCY LATEST` contains `expire-cycle`). Root cause was that auxiliary set-hot objects accepted expiration commands while only existing in hot state: `EXPIRE/PEXPIRE/EXPIREAT/PEXPIREAT` stored deadline metadata only if an auxiliary entry already existed, so active expire never saw the key. The fix materializes auxiliary hot-set entries before writing expiration metadata and clears auxiliary object/string side-state when auxiliary key removal happens, so `DBSIZE` no longer counts stale hot-set residue after expire. Validation: targeted cargo PASS (`latency_of_expire_events_are_collected_like_external_scenario`); isolated external PASS (`garnet-rs/tests/interop/redis_runtest_external_subset.sh` with `RUNTEXT_SINGLEDB=0` and `--single unit/latency-monitor --only "LATENCY of expire events are correctly collected"` => `ok=1 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=0`, result dir `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260315-013143/`); `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`643 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`). |
| 749 | 2026-03-15 | 11.500 | DONE | Fixed the no-skip hash keyspace-notification regression in auxiliary DBs. Added deterministic Rust regressions mirroring the external `tests/unit/pubsub.tcl` listpackex scenario (`hash_keyspace_notifications_emit_hexpired_for_lazy_hgetdel_in_auxiliary_db`, `auxiliary_hsetex_preserves_existing_field_ttl_when_plain_hsetex_updates_other_fields`) and fixed two root causes: auxiliary `HSETEX` field-TTL writes now create an auxiliary entry when the hash does not yet have persisted storage, and active expire now scans auxiliary hash-field expiration registries by shard so active/lazy field-expire notifications both reach `hexpired`. A flaky duplicate TCP regression was removed after the deterministic queue-level test plus the upstream external isolate proved the full pubsub sequence. | 750 | 2026-03-15 | 11.487 support slice | DONE | Integrated manual `FAILOVER` with live cluster topology on the source and target servers instead of leaving cluster state behind the replication role transition. `RedisReplicationCoordinator::become_master` now detects the attached-cluster case where the local worker is a replica and publishes `ClusterConfig::apply_failover_plan` to promote the local worker and take over the failed primary's slots; `become_replica(host, port)` now detects the complementary source-demotion case where the selected target endpoint is the local primary's known replica and publishes the matching failover plan so source redirections flip to the promoted target. Added exact live two-server regression `cluster_failover_command_updates_source_and_target_redirections`, which mirrors a cluster-mode `FAILOVER TO host port TIMEOUT ...` flow with real `REPLICAOF`, `WAIT`, `READONLY`, and post-failover routing assertions against both `ClusterConfigStore` snapshots and live `MOVED` responses. Validation: targeted cargo PASS (`cluster_failover_command_updates_source_and_target_redirections`, `failover_promotes_connected_replica_and_demotes_source`); `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`646 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`). No focused upstream Redis external cluster-failover case is available in the current interop harness, so external verification for this slice remains the existing live Rust integration coverage. |
| 751 | 2026-03-15 | 11.486 support slice | DONE | Closed the remaining operational `MIGRATE` replication/AOF semantics gap by giving command execution an explicit deferred replication-frame lane. `RequestProcessor` now collects request-scoped deferred replication frames alongside connection effects, owner-thread execution and `EXEC` replay preserve them, and the connection publish path emits those frames with explicit `SELECT` routing instead of falling back to the original command frame. `server_commands::handle_migrate` now enqueues a canonical `DEL key [key ...]` frame for each acknowledged non-`COPY` source deletion, and `replication_frame_for_command` stops replicating the top-level `MIGRATE` request verbatim. Exact coverage added first: live three-server TCP regression `migrate_rewrites_source_delete_for_downstream_replica_and_target_state`, plus updated request-lifecycle effect regressions after the execution-effect return-type expansion. Validation: `cargo check -p garnet-server --tests`; targeted cargo PASS (`migrate_rewrites_source_delete_for_downstream_replica_and_target_state`, `readonly_and_readwrite_emit_cluster_read_only_connection_effects`, `wait_emits_connection_wait_effects_on_command_path`, `waitaof_emits_connection_effects_on_command_path_when_local_fsync_lags`); isolated external PASS (`RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/dump` => `ok=14 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=14`, result dir `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260315-025600/`); command-coverage workflow full rerun PASS with stable external summary `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260315-025951/redis-runtest-external-full/`. `make test-server` still hit the known flaky `multidb_active_expire_increments_expired_keys_active_like_external_scenario` under full-suite load (`646 passed; 1 failed; 2 ignored`), while the exact test passed in isolated rerun immediately before the compatibility rerun, so that pre-existing active-expire observation flake remains tracked separately from this `MIGRATE` slice. |
| 752 | 2026-03-15 | I-004 support slice | DONE | Tightened pubsub delivery wakeups to reduce no-skip `ignore` exposure without regressing the connection hot path. Added per-client pending-message `Notify` handles to `PubSubState`, changed connection read wakeup logic so only connections with active pubsub subscriptions wait on pubsub-message notifications, and kept non-subscribed clients on the old timeout-based socket read path. Added the exact TCP regression `keyspace_notifications_evicted_events_external_pubsub_scenario`, mirroring the upstream `tests/unit/pubsub.tcl` `Keyspace notifications: evicted events` flow over real sockets (`CONFIG SET notify-keyspace-events Ee`, `CONFIG SET maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru`, `PSUBSCRIBE *`, `SET foo bar`, `CONFIG SET maxmemory 1`, expect `pmessage *__keyevent@0__:evicted foo`). Validation: targeted Rust PASS (`cargo test -p garnet-server keyspace_notifications_evicted_events_external_pubsub_scenario -- --nocapture`); isolated external `RUNTEXT_RUN_ONLY_ISOLATED_UNIT=unit/pubsub` PASS (`ok=45 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=0`) at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260315-080717/`; `make fmt`; `make test-server` PASS with expected counts (`648 passed; 0 failed; 2 ignored`, `23 passed`, `1 passed`); default compatibility full rerun PASS with stable summary `ok=2262 err=0 timeout=0 ignore=374` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/compatibility-report-20260315-082351/redis-runtest-external-full/`. No-skip visibility rerun improved diagnosis to `ok=709 err=0 timeout=1 ignore=110` at `garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/redis-runtest-external-20260315-081258/`; follow-up sequencing proved the remaining exposed blocker is not isolated `pubsub` anymore but `unit/querybuf -> unit/other -> PIPELINING stresser (also a regression for the old epoll bug)` contamination (`garnet-rs/tests/interop/results/seq-querybuf-other-pubsub-20260315-082035/`). Because `connection_handler` hot-path behavior changed, a smoke before/after benchmark was also recorded under `docs/performance/experiments/2026-03-15/11.501-pubsub-subscriber-wakeup/`; post-gating medians showed no regression (`SET ops 75963 -> 82326`, `GET ops 50297 -> 101833`, `SET p99 0.295ms -> 0.207ms`, `GET p99 0.599ms -> 0.143ms`). |

| 755 | 2026-03-15 | I-004 support slice | DONE | Removed the default whole-unit `unit/scripting` skip and reduced it to an exact isolated rerun, alongside a matching exact isolated rerun for the shared-lane `integration/redis-cli` replica-connect case.
